pi_items.source: Floreant POS documentation (https://archive.org/stream/pdfy-HdPmaCK2KdqH5Xqr/wiki_manual_floreantpos_1.4_56_djvu.txt and https://floreant.org/credit-card-payment/) confirms CASH and CREDIT_CARD as valid tender types. Verifier.py lines 150-168 checks for CASH payment, then VOID/REFUND (lines 162-168), then CREDIT_CARD payment.

pi_items.verified_value: Database location is determined dynamically by finding 'service.properties' file; '/opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server' is a fallback path only
pi_items.source: Code analysis: export_result.sh lines 34-37 show DB_PATH is found via `find /opt/floreantpos/database -name service.properties`, with '/opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server' used only when search returns empty. setup_floreant.sh lines 118-128 show identical pattern with fallback to '/opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server'.

privileged_info_summary: Floreant POS is an open-source Java-based point-of-sale system that supports Apache Derby as its embedded database. The task requires correcting a payment error by voiding a CASH payment and settling with CREDIT_CARD. These are valid Floreant POS tender types. The database location is dynamically discovered by searching for service.properties; the path in metadata is only a fallback.
